meta.source: Chapter Approved 2025-26 Mission Deck v1.5 + Chapter Approved Tournament Companion v1.5
meta.description: Chapter Approved 2025-26 matched play — Challenger cards, Asymmetric War, Twist deck

missionTypes.incursion: Mirrored deployment zones, same aim. 1000 points
missionTypes.strikeForce: Mirrored deployment zones, same aim. 2000 points
missionTypes.asymmetricWar: Different deployment zones and aims. Designed for 2000+ points. Attacker takes first turn

missionSequence: Determine Mission (draw Deployment, Primary Mission, optional Twist card)
Determine Attacker and Defender (roll off, or agree)
Deploy Armies (Defender first, TITANIC = skip next deployment turn)
Determine First Turn (roll off; Asymmetric War: Attacker goes first)

incursionModifications.unitLimit: Max 2 units with same datasheet name (4 for BATTLELINE or DEDICATED TRANSPORT)
incursionModifications.actions: Advancing does not make BATTLELINE unit ineligible for Actions. Starting an Action does not make BATTLELINE ineligible to shoot

asymmetricWarDeployment.setup: Both players set up all units simultaneously in their deployment zones. If no room — those units start in Reserves (within Reserves restrictions). If cannot be deployed or enter Reserves — destroyed

reservesRestrictions.maxUnitsInReserves: No more than half number of units in army
reservesRestrictions.maxPointsInReserves: No more than half total points of army
reservesRestrictions.destroyedIfNotArrived: Any Reserves not on battlefield by end of round 3 count as destroyed (except units placed into Strategic Reserves during battle)

challengerCards.triggerCondition: Player has fewer VP than opponent AND difference is 6 or more at start of battle round
challengerCards.duration: Player remains Challenger until end of battle round
challengerCards.drawing: Draw one Challenger card at start of your Command phase while Challenger
challengerCards.usage: Use EITHER the Stratagem OR complete the Mission on card — cannot do both
challengerCards.discardTiming: At end of your turn if not used. Discard after use
challengerCards.cpCostRules: Rules cannot change CP cost of Stratagem on Challenger card. CP-generating rules cannot be triggered by Challenger card Stratagem

tactical.drawing: Draw 2 cards at start of first Command phase. Draw to maintain 2 active cards
tactical.discarding: If VP scored from card this turn — discard that card at end of turn. Can voluntarily discard at end of your turn — gain 1CP
tactical.newOrders: 1CP — end of Command phase: discard one active card, draw new one

cards.ASSASSINATION: 4VP per CHARACTER destroyed (Fixed) or 5VP at end of turn (Tactical)
cards.BEHIND_ENEMY_LINES: 3VP for 1 unit, 4VP for 2+ units wholly in opponent's deployment zone (excluding AIRCRAFT and Battle-shocked)
cards.BRING_IT_DOWN: 2VP per MONSTER/VEHICLE destroyed. +2VP if combined Wounds 15+. +2VP if combined Wounds 20+
cards.STORM_HOSTILE_OBJECTIVE: 4VP — control objective opponent had at start of turn
cards.CULL_THE_HORDE: 5VP each time INFANTRY unit with Starting Strength 13+ destroyed
cards.RECOVER_ASSETS: 3VP for 2 units, 6VP for 3 units recovering assets across different battlefield zones
cards.AREA_DENIAL: 2VP — units within 3" of centre, no enemy within 3". 5VP if no enemy within 6"
cards.SECURE_NO_MANS_LAND: 2VP for 1, 5VP for 2+ objectives in No Man's Land
cards.MARKED_FOR_DEATH: 5VP when selected units destroyed — opponent picks 3 units when drawn
cards.DEFEND_STRONGHOLD: 3VP — control objectives in deployment zone at end of opponent's turn
cards.SABOTAGE: 3VP or 6VP depending on zone — unit in terrain feature performs action
cards.OVERWHELMING_FORCE: 3VP per enemy unit within range of objective destroyed (up to 5VP)
cards.EXTEND_BATTLE_LINES: 5VP — control objectives in own zone AND No Man's Land
cards.ENGAGE_ON_ALL_FRONTS: 2VP for 3 quarters, 4VP for 4 quarters — units more than 6" from centre
cards.ESTABLISH_LOCUS: 2VP at centre, 4VP in opponent's deployment zone
cards.CLEANSE: 2VP for 1, 4VP for 2+ objectives cleansed by units that gave up shooting

primaryMissions.TAKE_AND_HOLD: From round 2: 5VP per controlled objective (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.SUPPLY_DROP: Alpha/Omega objectives. Scoring increases by round. 15VP for Omega in round 5
primaryMissions.LINCHPIN: From round 2: controlling own deployment zone objective unlocks 5VP per other objective (3VP without it)
primaryMissions.SCORCHED_EARTH: Burn Objective action from round 2. Score for burned and controlled objectives
primaryMissions.HIDDEN_SUPPLIES: Extra objective in No Man's Land. 5VP per controlled No Man's Land objective (max 10VP per turn). End of battle bonuses
primaryMissions.PURGE_THE_FOE: End of each round: 4VP if any enemy destroyed + 4VP if more enemy than friendly. End of Command phase: 4VP for objectives + 4VP if more than opponent
primaryMissions.TERRAFORM: Terraform action on unclaimed objectives. 4VP per controlled + 2VP per terraformed
primaryMissions.BURDEN_OF_TRUST: Guard objectives. Score for controlling and defending
primaryMissions.THE_RITUAL: Ritual action to place objectives. 5VP per No Man's Land objective controlled
primaryMissions.UNEXPLODED_ORDNANCE: Hazard objectives — move them toward opponent's zone

tournamentMissionPool.description: 20 pre-generated tournament missions. No Asymmetric War, Twist, or Challenger cards in tournament
tournamentMissionPool.keyDifference: Models CAN end any move on top of objective markers

notes.cull_the_horde_faq: If Bodyguard unit of Attached unit meets Starting Strength 13+ criteria independently, yes VP scored when destroyed even if Leader survives
notes.terraform_faq: In Chapter Approved 2025-26, a player CAN terraform an objective their opponent already terraformed
notes.burden_of_trust_faq: Player going first can score guarding VP at end of rounds 1-5. Player going second can score at end of rounds 2-5
